# modtrees

The goal of `modtrees` is to create plain-text tree views of module and
namespace hierarchy by statically parsing R source files.

## Installation

You can install the development version of `modtrees` like so:

``` r

install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("mjfrigaard/modtrees")
```

## Example

Example using the [`ttdviewer` source
code](https://github.com/mjfrigaard/ttdviewer) files:

``` r

library(modtrees)
```

``` bash
R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ app_server.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ app_ui.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ ctr.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ inspect_plot.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ launch.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ load_tt_data.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ logr_msg.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ mod_input.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ mod_list.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ mod_plot.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ mod_report_desc.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ mod_report_download.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ mod_report_input.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ mod_table.R
‚îú‚îÄ‚îÄ render_report.R
‚îî‚îÄ‚îÄ testthat.R

1 directory, 16 files
```

Use the
[`mod_tree()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/modtrees/reference/mod_tree.md)
function to print a module namespace tree:

``` r

mod_tree(
  path = "R", 
  app_fun = "launch", 
  ui_fun = "app_ui", 
  server_fun = "app_server"
  )
```

``` verbatim
‚ñà‚îÄlaunch
‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄapp_ui
‚îÇ ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_input_ui
‚îÇ ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_report_input_ui
‚îÇ ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_report_desc_ui
‚îÇ ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_report_download_ui
‚îÇ ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_list_ui
‚îÇ ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_table_ui
‚îÇ ‚îî‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_plot_ui
‚îî‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄapp_server
  ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_input_server
  ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_report_input_server
  ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_report_desc_server
  ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_list_server
  ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_table_server
  ‚îú‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_plot_server
  ‚îî‚îÄ‚ñà‚îÄmod_report_download_server 
```

# Package index

## All functions

- [`hello()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/modtrees/reference/hello.md)
  : Hello, World!
- [`mod_tree()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/modtrees/reference/mod_tree.md)
  : Display a Shiny function module tree
- [`run_demo()`](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/modtrees/reference/run_demo.md)
  : Launch a demo Shiny app

- [Realistic
  App](https://mjfrigaard.github.io/modtrees/articles/realistic.md):
